title: ACTREC Notification 2026 - Walk-in-Interview for Various Clinical Specialist Posts
description: The Advanced Centre for Treatment, Research and Education in Cancer (ACTREC) has announced the official notification for the recruitment of various Clinical Specialist Positions. Candidates with B.E/ B.Tech can grab this chance and apply for the ACTREC Notification 2026 . Here, we have included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, application fee, and how to apply for these posts. Interested and eligible candidates can attend the walk-in at the address below....
